batch_metadata.note: CP2 CALIBRATION BATCH. RF-08 Triangulation pass initialized. Triage heatmap: 5 keyword hits total across dataset (low); all Phase A; CP1 elevated to full pass because keywords do not capture relay-through-Olivia pattern. Aug 2022 is the sole triage hot period within this batch.

unflagged_notable.message_text: ROW-124 (Received): 'It goes to voicemail after 8:30 because you've been told not to call after 8:30' | ROW-125 (Received): 'Since you wouldn't listen I set it long time ago to do not disturb at 8:30 so you couldn't just keep calling after I tell you not to'
unflagged_notable.assessment: RF-08 peripheral consideration: Melissa's characterization of Eli's calling pattern implies Olivia (or a third party) may be aware of the call restrictions and the framing of Eli as a non-listener. If Melissa has communicated this 'Eli doesn't listen' framing to Olivia, it would constitute early RF-08 triangulation (building Olivia's perception of Eli through Melissa's narrative). However, from the text alone this is Melissa characterizing Eli to Eli — not through Olivia. No RF-08 primary flag. Cross-ref RF-02 primary (phone-blocking arc). CP2 question: did Melissa discuss this 8:30 rule with Olivia in ways that framed Eli as defiant?

arc_state_snapshot.note: RF-08 arc state initialized at zero. B-001 is the lowest-conflict period in the dataset (Jan-Oct 2022). No RF-08 primary signals detected. Abby enters picture mid-2022 (Sep 2022 detection per CP1) — this is a potential future triangulation activation point (Melissa's Abby-targeting may recruit Olivia as a third party). Triage Aug 2022 hot period: assessed as likely Sent-direction false positive (Eli messaging about family logistics) or very low-level Received reference to Melissa's family plans. Neither constitutes RF-08 primary threshold in calibration batch context.

items: CP2-RF08: 5 calibration questions generated — see cp2-RF-08-review.json

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Lowest-conflict period in dataset. Jan-Oct 2022. Pre-Abby-detection for most of the batch. Communication pattern cooperative-baseline. No triangulation episodes identified at RF-08 primary threshold.
batch_observations.rf08_assessment: Zero primary RF-08 flags. The triage heatmap's 5 keyword hits appear to reflect Sent-direction logistics mentions (Eli referencing family plans) and possibly one or two Received mentions of Melissa's family — neither constituting RF-08 triangulation. The CP1 override ('keywords don't capture relay-through-Olivia pattern') is confirmed by this batch: the actual RF-08 signal will surface in the coaching and relay behaviors documented throughout the dataset, not in explicit triangulation keywords. CP2 calibration is critical before proceeding.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-01 ADD-004 (Olivia-as-relay for alienating content) is the primary cross-RF anchor for RF-08. The relay-through-Olivia mechanism is shared between RF-01 (parental alienation content delivered through Olivia) and RF-08 (Olivia triangulated into parental conflict). These are distinct: RF-01 = what Olivia is made to say; RF-08 = the structural use of Olivia as a communication/alliance channel. Both arcs will need to be tracked but RF-08 focuses on the triangulation mechanism itself, not the alienating content. ROW-6819 coaching admission (B-018, Aug 2024) is the strongest RF-08 primary candidate in the dataset — it documents Melissa explicitly scripting Olivia's conversations with Eli.
